assertion_results.text: Each non-documentation, non-testing task file contains all required template sections: Repository, Target Branch, Description, at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements. Documentation tasks (tasks whose filename or description indicates doc-only scope) and testing tasks (tasks whose filename or description indicates cross-cutting testing scope) are exempt from requiring Files to Modify, Files to Create, and Implementation Notes — they must still include Repository, Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements
assertion_results.evidence: Implementation tasks 1-3 all contain Repository, Target Branch, Description, Files to Modify and/or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements. Task 1 has Files to Create (advisory_severity_summary.rs) and Files to Modify (model/mod.rs, service/sbom.rs) plus Implementation Notes. Task 2 has Files to Create (advisory_summary.rs) and Files to Modify (endpoints/mod.rs, tests/api/sbom.rs) plus Implementation Notes. Task 3 has Files to Modify (graph/advisory/mod.rs) plus Implementation Notes. Testing tasks 4-5 and documentation task 6 include Repository, Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements, correctly omitting Files to Modify/Create and Implementation Notes.

assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 12 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: 6 task files produced: task-1-advisory-severity-summary-model-and-service.md, task-2-advisory-summary-endpoint.md, task-3-advisory-summary-cache-invalidation.md, task-4-smoke-tests.md, task-5-performance-benchmarks.md, task-6-update-api-documentation.md. summary-comment.md confirms 'Total: 6 tasks'. 6 is between 3 and 12 inclusive.
All 6 task files contain '## Repository\ntrusify-backend'. Verified in task-1 through task-6. summary-comment.md also confirms 'trustify-backend — all 6 tasks target this repository'.

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Dependency chain from task files: Task 1 has no dependencies. Task 2 depends on Task 1. Task 3 depends on Task 2. Tasks 4, 5, 6 each depend on Tasks 1, 2, 3. This forms a strict DAG: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> {4, 5, 6}. No cycles exist. summary-comment.md visualizes this DAG explicitly.

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 Files to Modify: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (exists in tree), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (exists in tree). Files to Create: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_severity_summary.rs (new file in existing model/ directory). Task 2 Files to Modify: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (exists), tests/api/sbom.rs (exists). Files to Create: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs (new file in existing endpoints/ directory). Task 3 Files to Modify: modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (exists in tree). Tasks 4-6 have no Files to Modify or Files to Create. All paths align with the repo-backend.md directory tree.

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: impact-map.md changes section lists: 'Add AdvisorySeveritySummary response model struct with fields for critical, high, medium, low, and total counts', 'Add severity aggregation service method to SbomService that queries the sbom_advisory join table grouped by severity', 'Add GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary endpoint with 5-minute cache and optional ?threshold query parameter', 'Add cache invalidation for advisory summaries in the advisory ingestion pipeline when new advisories are linked to an SBOM', 'Add integration tests for the advisory-summary endpoint covering happy path, 404, and threshold filtering'. Each change names specific structs, endpoints, tables, and behaviors.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 task files have '## Repository\ntrusify-backend' as a single repository name on one line. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 task files contain '## Target Branch' (set to 'main'), '## Description' (with substantive content), '## Acceptance Criteria' (with checkbox items), and '## Test Requirements' (with checkbox items). Verified across task-1 through task-6.

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest, not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: All Files to Modify paths exist in repo-backend.md: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs, tests/api/sbom.rs, modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs. Files to Create paths (advisory_severity_summary.rs, advisory_summary.rs) are new files in existing directories from the manifest (modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/ and modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/). No invented or non-existent directory paths.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every non-documentation, non-testing task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance. Documentation tasks and testing tasks are exempt from this requirement as they intentionally omit Implementation Notes
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 Implementation Notes reference: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs, details.rs, entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, common/src/db/query.rs, SbomSummary, SbomDetails structs, SeaORM query builder, GROUP BY with COUNT(DISTINCT), AppError::NotFound. Task 2 references: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs, endpoints/mod.rs, Axum extractor pattern with specific function signature, ThresholdParams struct, tower-http caching, tests/api/sbom.rs pattern. Task 3 references: modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs, tower-http caching infrastructure, modules/ingestor/src/graph/sbom/mod.rs. All reference specific file paths and code patterns. Tasks 4-6 are exempt (testing/documentation).

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Target Branch section set to 'main'
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 task files contain '## Target Branch\nmain'. Verified in task-1 through task-6.

assertion_results.text: For each task created, a description digest is produced — evidenced by a separate digest file (e.g., task-N-digest.md), a digest entry in the impact map, or a '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:<64-char-hex>' marker in any output file. The digest must contain a format-tagged SHA-256 hash — exactly 64 lowercase hex characters prefixed by 'sha256-md:' or 'sha256-adf:', not a placeholder, abbreviated value, or example string
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks have separate digest files: task-1-digest.md (sha256-md:68c07090656ff759c7d3b369c980f7fc96532f3e4807bf97a47d092f6bc6f020), task-2-digest.md (sha256-md:679a77737e5e389c5222c30b4dbb1ec6607079a9d7ad6845745ab3baf9edaa59), task-3-digest.md (sha256-md:dedcb06123c6fbb988ab47ed63435750e88c045cec5189cf2a27f01c18a839aa), task-4-digest.md (sha256-md:0f5b4664c53f8f5d81ed8d48918faef4f6cf81d0210110a9b2fb04394d15c820), task-5-digest.md (sha256-md:f5bc8b684ff0b52572092801498d326f2747da5b329a9422e7002382912714fe), task-6-digest.md (sha256-md:a34b92819ea1adb4a5b0caf1aef760534b12e0228374b28678b2424358619cc5). Each has exactly 64 lowercase hex characters prefixed by 'sha256-md:'.

assertion_results.text: Convention-aware enrichment validates file-type applicability per shared/convention-applicability-rules.md before including a convention — inapplicable conventions are excluded entirely (not listed with 'Not applicable' annotations), and applicable ones include a rationale in the prescribed format ('Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'), not free-form prose
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 includes 2 convention rationales: 'Applies: task creates modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_severity_summary.rs matching the convention's module structure scope' and 'Applies: task modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs matching the convention's Rust handler file scope'. Task 2 includes 4 convention rationales all following the 'Applies: task modifies/creates <file> matching the convention's <scope>' format. Task 3 includes 1 convention rationale: 'Applies: task modifies modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs matching the convention's Rust module file scope'. No inapplicable conventions are listed with 'Not applicable' annotations. All rationales follow the prescribed format, not free-form prose.

assertion_results.text: When the Feature issue has a priority set (not 'Undefined'), the plan documents that the Feature's priority is inherited by created tasks — evidenced by priority field values in the impact map, task creation log, or task description files. When the Feature's priority is 'Undefined', the plan documents that priority inheritance is skipped (not propagated as null or 'Undefined')
assertion_results.evidence: Feature priority is 'Major' (not 'Undefined'). impact-map.md documents: '| priority | Major | Propagated to all tasks (not "Undefined") |' with additional_fields JSON showing '"priority": {"name": "Major"}'. summary-comment.md confirms: '| priority | Major | Yes | Feature priority is set (not "Undefined") — propagated to all 6 tasks |'.

assertion_results.text: When the Feature issue has a non-empty fixVersions array and the fixVersion scope config (from ### Jira Field Defaults in CLAUDE.md) is 'task' or 'both' (or absent, defaulting to 'both'), the plan documents that fixVersions are inherited by created tasks — evidenced by fixVersion values in the impact map, task creation log, or task description files. When fixVersion scope is 'feature' or the Feature has no fixVersions, the plan documents that fixVersion inheritance is skipped
assertion_results.evidence: Feature fixVersions is 'RHTPA 1.5.0' (non-empty). CLAUDE.md has no '### Jira Field Defaults' section, so scope defaults to 'both'. impact-map.md documents: '| fixVersions | RHTPA 1.5.0 | Propagated to all tasks (fixVersion scope defaults to "both" — no Jira Field Defaults section in CLAUDE.md) |' with additional_fields JSON showing '"fixVersions": [{"name": "RHTPA 1.5.0"}]'. summary-comment.md confirms: '| fixVersions | RHTPA 1.5.0 | Yes | Feature has non-empty fixVersions and fixVersion scope defaults to "both" (no Jira Field Defaults section configured) — propagated to all 6 tasks |'.

assertion_results.text: A summary of inherited field propagation is produced — evidenced by a summary-comment.md file in the outputs directory, or a summary section in the impact map that includes the inherited priority and fixVersion values propagated to tasks, or states they were omitted and why
assertion_results.evidence: summary-comment.md exists in the outputs directory and contains an 'Inherited Field Propagation' section with a table showing priority (Major, propagated) and fixVersions (RHTPA 1.5.0, propagated) with rationale. Additionally, impact-map.md contains a matching 'Inherited Field Propagation' section with the same values and an additional_fields JSON block.

assertion_results.text: A documentation task is generated because the feature description's Documentation Considerations section indicates doc impact (Updates — add endpoint to REST API reference). The documentation task includes Repository, Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements, and Dependencies sections, and omits Files to Modify, Files to Create, API Changes, Implementation Notes, Reuse Candidates, and Verification Commands
assertion_results.evidence: Task 6 (task-6-update-api-documentation.md) is the documentation task. Its Description references 'The feature's Documentation Considerations indicate doc impact type "Updates"'. It includes: Repository (trustify-backend), Target Branch (main), Description (detailed), Acceptance Criteria (5 items), Test Requirements (3 items), Dependencies (Tasks 1, 2, 3). It correctly omits: Files to Modify, Files to Create, API Changes, Implementation Notes, Reuse Candidates, and Verification Commands — none of these sections appear in the file.

assertion_results.text: Testing tasks are generated from the testing readiness template — exactly 2 testing tasks are created (one per test category: Smoke Tests and Performance Benchmarks). Each testing task includes Repository, Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements, and Dependencies sections, and omits Files to Modify, Files to Create, API Changes, Implementation Notes, Reuse Candidates, and Verification Commands
assertion_results.evidence: Exactly 2 testing tasks: task-4-smoke-tests.md (Smoke Tests) and task-5-performance-benchmarks.md (Performance Benchmarks). Task 4 includes: Repository (trustify-backend), Target Branch (main), Description (references 'testing readiness template's Smoke Tests category'), Acceptance Criteria (3 items), Test Requirements (5 items), Dependencies (Tasks 1, 2, 3). Omits Files to Modify/Create, API Changes, Implementation Notes, Reuse Candidates, Verification Commands. Task 5 includes: Repository (trustify-backend), Target Branch (main), Description (references 'testing readiness template's Performance Benchmarks category'), Acceptance Criteria (3 items), Test Requirements (5 items), Dependencies (Tasks 1, 2, 3). Omits the same sections.

assertion_results.text: Each testing task depends on all implementation tasks (not on documentation or other testing tasks)
assertion_results.evidence: Implementation tasks are Tasks 1, 2, 3. Task 4 (smoke tests) Dependencies: 'Depends on: Task 1', 'Depends on: Task 2', 'Depends on: Task 3' — all 3 implementation tasks, no documentation (Task 6) or testing (Task 5) tasks. Task 5 (performance benchmarks) Dependencies: 'Depends on: Task 1', 'Depends on: Task 2', 'Depends on: Task 3' — all 3 implementation tasks, no documentation (Task 6) or testing (Task 4) tasks.
